Lanchester R&D Core Thesis

"Any problem can be solved by Research and Design. But only if Lanchester properly defines it."

Timeline

Explore The Founder Journey.

Follow the full chronology of systems, decisions, and milestones, then open the admin editor to maintain it.

Open TimelineTimeline Admin

What Lanchester R&D
Actually Does.

Lanchester R&D helps organizations solve complex operational problems through product strategy, AI workflow design, systems audits, and custom application development.

Service Intent

Practical advisory and build support for teams navigating ambiguity, coordination debt, and high-cost operational friction.

Product StrategySystems AuditAI Workflow DesignApp Development
Core Services

Commercial Service Paths

Buyer-readable offers with tactical depth.

01Service

Product Strategy

Lanchester R&D provides product strategy consulting for teams navigating unclear priorities, complex stakeholders, and high-stakes operational decisions.

Open Service Brief
02Service

Systems Audit

Lanchester R&D conducts systems audits to diagnose workflow friction, data bottlenecks, and operational latency across product and service teams.

Open Service Brief
03Service

AI Workflow Design

Design AI-assisted workflows that reduce friction and improve operational performance without introducing automation theater.

Open Service Brief
04Service

App Development

Custom application development for organizations with complex operational workflows, specialized users, and high reliability requirements.

Open Service Brief
05Service

Nonprofit App Development

Nonprofit app development and NGO technology consulting through Abbey Fields Foundation, focused on mission-driven operational systems.

Open Service Brief
All ServicesPartner With Lanchester
Methodology

Exploration Before Execution

We map before we move. Truth before capital.

01
01

Define

Identify the operational friction.

02
02

Map

Model actors, flows, and incentives.

03
03

Validate

Pressure-test assumptions with real signals.

04
04

Execute

Build the highest-leverage intervention.

05
05

Measure

Track the change with hard metrics.

Execution

From Bottleneck to Build

Focused sprints, clear ownership, measurable movement.

  • Strategic alignment on goals and constraints.
  • Operational mapping of systems and risks.
  • Design and build of the highest-leverage intervention.
  • Measurement loops to maintain performance after launch.
